name: Vocational Training Centre, Chintalapadu
description: New skill development centre offering courses in tailoring, electrical work and computer literacy for 300 trainees per year.

name: Zilla Parishad High School upgrade, Chintalapadu
description: Add 6 classrooms, science lab and toilets to the existing ZPHS; reduces travel to the nearest high school from 5.6 km.

name: Kondaveedu-Nallamada road widening
description: Widen and resurface 12 km of connecting road between Kondaveedu and Nallamada including two culverts.

name: Piped water scheme, Jangamvari Thanda
description: Overhead tank and household connections for the tanda; current coverage is 28% of households.

name: Primary Health Centre upgrade, Gopannagudem
description: Upgrade sub-centre to a 24x7 PHC with delivery room and two staff quarters.

name: Solar street lighting, all mandals
description: 1,200 solar street lights across habitations with poor grid reliability.

name: Community sanitation complex, Nallamada
description: Two community toilet blocks with water connection near the weekly market.

name: Cold storage unit, Krishnapuram
description: 500 MT cold storage for vegetable farmers to reduce distress sales.

name: Devarakonda internal CC roads
description: Cement concrete roads for 8 internal streets currently unpaved.

name: Digital library, Suryagiri Town
description: Air-conditioned digital library with 60 seats for competitive exam aspirants.
